name: legalcode-codex
description: Legalcode for Codex with public Legalcode MCP access and 50 public legal skills.

interface.shortDescription: Free legal research and drafting skills for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bundle the hosted public Legalcode MCP endpoint with 50 public Legalcode skills for legal research, contract workflows, privacy, compliance, corporate transactions, litigation, and document workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Legalcode to review this contract and identify the main legal risks.
Use Legalcode to analyze the governing statute and explain the compliance implications.
